text:
Created attachment 214587
Proposed svn diff

Hello,

This is an update patch to subliminal 2.1.0 but it complains about "The 'guessit>=3.0.0' distribution was not found and is required by subliminal".

Could you update multimedia/py-guessit to latest 3 version?

Thanks,

Nuno Teixeira
